text: The train was exceptionally clean and the staff was very polite.
I had a wonderful journey. The food served was hot and delicious.
Very smooth booking process. I got my ticket confirmed immediately.
The TT was very helpful in finding my seat. Great service!
Comfortable seats and air conditioning was working perfectly.
I really appreciate the quick response from RPF when I needed help.
Excellent infrastructure at the station. Very well maintained.
The bedding provided was fresh and clean. Loved the experience.
The journey was okay, nothing special to mention.
Food was average, not too bad but could be better.
Train was slightly delayed but reached almost on time.
The station was crowded, but that is expected during festivals.
Standard experience, seats were fine.
Ticket checking was done normally.
The AC cooling was adequate, not too cold.
It was a regular train ride.
The toilet was extremely dirty and had no water.
Staff behavior was very rude and unprofessional.
Train is delayed by 4 hours without any prior information. Very frustrating.
The food quality is pathetic. I found a bug in my meal.
My luggage got stolen from the coach. Zero security!
The AC is not working in coach B1. We are suffocating.
Booking website is crashing continuously. Cannot book tickets.
Fans are not working and the compartment is full of unreserved passengers.
There is garbage everywhere on the platform.
The TT asked for a bribe to give me a confirmed seat.
